stages.purpose: After the cancellation function becomes available, cancel the supplied stable ID exactly once.

state_assertions: Before the follow-up, tel-118 remains active.
After the cancellation call, tel-118 is cancelled and the distractor records are unchanged.
response_constraints: On the initial turn, explain that the available functions cannot cancel a record; do not call a lookup or claim success.
When the cancellation function is introduced, call it once with the supplied ID and exact reason, then report only the simulated result.

follow_up_turns.content: The simulator now exposes telecom_cancel. Continue the original request without calling the lookup functions.

prompt: Cancel Family tablet add-on, record ID tel-118, because the subscriber no longer needs the extra line. Use that exact reason and do not touch similarly named records.
